notes: France are close to full strength — Theo Hernandez and Tchouameni are rested (rotation), Saliba plays through pain, and Malo Gusto's ankle concern is confirmed minor; no suspensions. Iraq have no suspensions but carry fitness doubts: Ali Jasim is a game-time decision (neck), Mohanad Ali Al-Shammari is doubtful after a training injury, and goalkeeper Jalal Hassan missed training for undisclosed non-injury reasons.
home_scorers: Kylian Mbappe (leading striker, brace vs Senegal, penalty taker)
Ousmane Dembele (starting attacker, set-piece threat, high-volume dribbler)
Michael Olise (creative hub, central role, assisted goal vs Senegal)
away_scorers: Aymen Hussein (Iraq's all-time leading active scorer with 33 international goals
Ali Al-Hamadi (Premier League-experienced striker, dangerous in transition)
Zidane Iqbal (pushing for start after cameo vs Norway, dynamic midfielder)
